name: magnet-mouse — Magnetic Cursor Buttons
description: Makes buttons magnetically attracted to the cursor within a configurable distance. Add class btn-magnetic to any CTA button.
head:
<style>
  .btn-magnetic { transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); }
</style>
body:
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/fluffy-factory/magnet-mouse@latest/lib/magnet-mouse.min.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    if (!window.MagnetMouse) return;
    // Auto-apply to primary CTAs
    document.querySelectorAll('.btn--primary, .btn-magnetic, [data-magnetic]').forEach(function(el) {
      el.classList.add('btn-magnetic');
    });
    if (document.querySelector('.btn-magnetic')) {
      new MagnetMouse({ magnet: { element: '.btn-magnetic', distance: 28, position: 'center' } }).init();
    }
  });
</script>
